subject: Validation Report - {supplier}
body:
Dear {supplier} Team,

Please find attached the Price Validation Report.

During our review, we identified a number of line items that could not be matched between our Master Price Table and your Supplier Shipment file. These entries appear in the report under the category:

> **"Exists in Supplier Shipment only (not in Master Table)"**

**Root Cause**

The most likely cause is an inconsistency in the following two fields between the two sources:

- **ODM Part#** — the part number format, leading/trailing spaces, or special characters may differ
- **ODM Site** — the site name notation may differ (e.g. `INVENTEC_CQ` vs `INVENTEC CQ`, abbreviation differences, or extra characters)

Our system uses these two fields as a combined key to match records across both files. If either field does not match **exactly**, the record will be treated as unmatched.

**Action Required**

Please cross-check the affected line items (listed in the attached report) and ensure that the **ODM Part#** and **ODM Site** values in your Supplier Shipment file are fully aligned with our Master Price Table.

Once corrected, please resubmit the updated shipment file or master price table so we can re-run the validation.

If you have any questions or need the Master Price Table as a reference, please do not hesitate to reach out.

Best regards,
{name}
